[order.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29001452/order.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>灶囍（東坡肉、蹄膀、豬腳）專賣店｜線上訂購</title>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --red:#C0392B;--red-dark:#8B1A1A;--red-deep:#5C0F0F;
  --gold:#C9A84C;--gold-light:#E8C96A;
  --paper:#FAF3E8;--paper-dark:#F0E4CC;
  --ink:#1A0A00;--ink-soft:#4A2C1A;--ink-muted:#8B6550;
  --white:#FFFFFF;--border:#DDC9A8;
  --green:#2D6A17;--err:#B82E22;--radius:10px;
}
body{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);font-family:-apple-system,"Noto Sans TC","PingFang TC",sans-serif;min-height:100vh;padding-bottom:120px;}
.hero{background:linear-gradient(170deg,var(--red-deep) 0%,var(--red-dark) 45%,var(--red) 100%);padding:24px 20px 20px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero::before,.hero::after{content:"❖";position:absolute;color:rgba(201,168,76,0.18);font-size:90px;line-height:1;pointer-events:none;}
.hero::before{top:-20px;left:-20px;}.hero::after{bottom:-20px;right:-20px;}
.logo-img{width:100px;height:100px;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0 auto 10px;mix-blend-mode:multiply;}
.hero-brand{color:#fff;font-size:17px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:2px;text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);margin-bottom:3px;}
.hero-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.phone-strip{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
.phone-strip a{color:var(--gold-light);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-decoration:none;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);padding:5px 13px;border-radius:20px;}
.phone-strip a::before{content:"📞 ";}
.shipping-notice{margin:14px 14px 0;background:#fff8e1;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:11px 13px;}
.shipping-notice .sn-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:7px;}
.shipping-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.5;}
.shipping-row:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}.shipping-row .icon{flex-shrink:0;font-size:14px;}
.shipping-row strong{color:var(--red-dark);}
.menu-section{margin:16px 14px 0;}
.menu-section-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.menu-section-title .ln{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),transparent);}
.menu-section-title .ln.r{background:linear-gradient(270deg,var(--gold),transparent);}
.menu-section-title h2{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--red-dark);white-space:nowrap;padding:4px 12px;border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:4px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.07);}
.item-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:12px 12px 12px 14px;margin-bottom:7px;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(92,15,15,0.08);border-left:3px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s;}
.item-card.active{border-left-color:var(--red);box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(192,57,43,0.13);}
.item-icon{font-size:24px;flex-shrink:0;width:30px;text-align:center;}
.item-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.item-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink);}
.item-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-muted);line-height:1.4;margin-top:1px;}
.item-price{font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:var(--red);white-space:nowrap;min-width:46px;text-align:right;}
.item-price::before{content:"$";font-size:10px;vertical-align:super;}
.qty-ctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.qty-btn{width:32px;height:32px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:18px;font-weight:300;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;transition:background .12s;line-height:1;}
.qty-btn:first-child{border-radius:6px 0 0 6px;}.qty-btn:last-child{border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;}
.qty-btn:active{background:var(--paper-dark);}
.qty-num{width:34px;height:32px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--white);text-align:center;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.qty-num.nz{color:var(--red);}
.form-card{background:var(--white);margin:14px 14px 0;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px 15px;box-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(92,15,15,0.07);}
.form-sec-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:13px;padding-bottom:7px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--paper-dark);}
.field{margin-bottom:14px;}.field:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
label.fl{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:5px;}
label.fl .req{color:var(--err);}label.fl .opt{color:var(--ink-muted);font-size:11px;font-weight:400;}
input[type=text],input[type=tel]{width:100%;padding:12px 13px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink);background:var(--paper);-webkit-appearance:none;transition:border-color .15s;}
input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--red);background:#fff;}
input.ef{border-color:var(--err);}
.errmsg{color:var(--err);font-size:12px;margin-top:4px;display:none;}.errmsg.show{display:block;}
.hidden-field{display:none;}
.toggle-group{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;}
.toggle-group.three{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;}
.toggle-group input[type=radio]{display:none;}
.toggle-group label.tl{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:10px 6px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;background:var(--paper);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;text-align:center;gap:3px;line-height:1.3;}
.toggle-group label.tl .tl-icon{font-size:20px;}
.toggle-group input[type=radio]:checked+label.tl{border-color:var(--red);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff5f5,#ffe8e8);color:var(--red-dark);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(192,57,43,0.13);}
.toggle-option.disabled label.tl{opacity:.35;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none;}
.bank-box{background:#fffbe6;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:11px 13px;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;margin-bottom:12px;}
.bank-box .bk-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:3px;}
.bank-box .bk-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--red-dark);line-height:1.8;}
.calendar-wrap{margin-top:12px;}
.cal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;}
.cal-header .cal-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red-dark);}
.cal-nav{width:32px;height:32px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;background:var(--paper);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--ink-soft);}
.cal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:3px;}
.cal-dow{text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-muted);padding:4px 0;}
.cal-day{aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:default;color:var(--ink-muted);}
.cal-day.available{background:rgba(192,57,43,0.08);color:var(--red-dark);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,0.2);}
.cal-day.available:active{background:rgba(192,57,43,0.2);}
.cal-day.selected{background:var(--red)!important;color:#fff!important;border-color:var(--red)!important;}
.cal-day.past{opacity:.35;}.cal-day.empty{pointer-events:none;}.cal-day.today-mark{font-weight:900;text-decoration:underline;}
.cal-legend{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-muted);}
.cal-legend span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.cal-legend .dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.dot-avail{background:rgba(192,57,43,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,0.4);}.dot-sel{background:var(--red);}
.selected-date-display{margin-top:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(192,57,43,0.08);border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--red-dark);text-align:center;}





.cart-strip{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:var(--white);border-top:2px solid var(--red);padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;box-shadow:0 -4px 16px rgba(92,15,15,0.10);z-index:50;}
.cart-total{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-muted);}
.cart-total strong{display:block;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:var(--red);line-height:1.1;}
.cart-total strong::before{content:"$";}
.cart-total .sub-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-top:1px;}
.btn-checkout{flex-shrink:0;padding:12px 22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--red-dark),var(--red));color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(139,26,26,0.35);-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
.btn-checkout:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;}.cart-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-top:1px;}
.modal-bg{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(92,15,15,0.5);z-index:200;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;}
.modal-bg.open{display:flex;}
.modal{background:var(--white);width:100%;max-width:520px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;padding:22px 18px 30px;animation:slideUp .28s ease;}
@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%)}to{transform:translateY(0)}}
.modal-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:var(--red-dark);letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--paper-dark);}
.confirm-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:9px;font-size:14px;align-items:flex-start;}
.confirm-row .ck{color:var(--ink-muted);font-weight:600;min-width:72px;flex-shrink:0;}
.confirm-row .cv{color:var(--ink);font-weight:500;flex:1;}
.confirm-row .cv.total{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--red);}
.confirm-item-line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink);padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--paper-dark);}
.confirm-item-line:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.modal-actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:18px;}
.btn-back-modal{padding:13px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:var(--paper);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-soft);cursor:pointer;}
.btn-confirm-send{padding:13px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--red-dark),var(--red));border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(139,26,26,0.3);}
.btn-confirm-send:disabled{opacity:.55;cursor:not-allowed;}
.success-screen{display:none;text-align:center;padding:60px 24px 40px;}
.success-stamp{width:90px;height:90px;border:3px solid var(--red);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 18px;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(192,57,43,0.1);}
.success-stamp span{font-size:34px;}
.success-screen h2{font-size:20px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px;}
.success-screen p{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-muted);line-height:1.8;}
.order-id-box{margin:16px auto;background:var(--paper-dark);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 20px;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:var(--red-dark);letter-spacing:3px;display:inline-block;}
.btn-again{margin-top:18px;padding:12px 30px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="hero">
  <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="灶囍手作">
  <div class="hero-brand">灶囍（東坡肉、蹄膀、豬腳）專賣店</div>
  <div class="hero-sub">傳統工法　真材實料　手路菜</div>
  <div class="phone-strip">
    <a href="tel:0980388219">0980-388-219</a>
    <a href="tel:0931997219">0931-997-219</a>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="shipping-notice">
  <div class="sn-title">🚚 運費說明</div>
  <div class="shipping-row"><span class="icon">🔴</span><span>單筆 <strong>滿 $3,000 免運</strong>（限單地點、限20kg）</span></div>
  <div class="shipping-row"><span class="icon">🚛</span><span><strong>宅配通低溫宅配 $200</strong>（限20kg，超過需寄第二件）</span></div>
  <div class="shipping-row"><span class="icon">🏪</span><span><strong>7-11 店到店 $150</strong>（限10kg，超過需寄第二件）</span></div>
</div>
<div id="mainScreen">
<div class="menu-section">
  <div class="menu-section-title"><div class="ln"></div><h2>🍱 套餐組</h2><div class="ln r"></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-A"><div class="item-icon">🥩</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">A 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">東坡肉 ＋ 香滷嫩筍</div></div><div class="item-price">560</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('A',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-A">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('A',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-B"><div class="item-icon">🍖</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">B 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">醬燒蹄膀 ＋ 香滷嫩筍</div></div><div class="item-price">580</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('B',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-B">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('B',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-C"><div class="item-icon">🥩</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">C 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">東坡肉 ＋ 醬燒豬腳 ＋ 香滷嫩筍</div></div><div class="item-price">820</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('C',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-C">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('C',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-D"><div class="item-icon">🍖</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">D 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">醬燒蹄膀 ＋ 醬燒豬腳 ＋ 香滷嫩筍</div></div><div class="item-price">840</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('D',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-D">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('D',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-E"><div class="item-icon">🎊</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">E 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">東坡肉 ＋ 醬燒蹄膀 ＋ 醬燒豬腳 ＋ 香滷嫩筍</div></div><div class="item-price">1260</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('E',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-E">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('E',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-F"><div class="item-icon">🥩</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">F 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">東坡肉 ＋ 醬燒豬腳</div></div><div class="item-price">710</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('F',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-F">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('F',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-G"><div class="item-icon">🍖</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">G 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">醬燒蹄膀 ＋ 醬燒豬腳</div></div><div class="item-price">730</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('G',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-G">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('G',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-H"><div class="item-icon">🎁</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">H 套餐</div><div class="item-desc">東坡肉 ＋ 醬燒蹄膀 ＋ 醬燒豬腳</div></div><div class="item-price">1160</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('H',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-H">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('H',1)">＋</button></div></div>
</div>
<div class="menu-section">
  <div class="menu-section-title"><div class="ln"></div><h2>🥩 單點區</h2><div class="ln r"></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-dongpo"><div class="item-icon">🍖</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">東坡肉</div><div class="item-desc">500g ± 10%</div></div><div class="item-price">450</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('dongpo',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-dongpo">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('dongpo',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-tipang"><div class="item-icon">🦵</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">醬燒蹄膀</div><div class="item-desc">700g ± 10%</div></div><div class="item-price">470</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('tipang',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-tipang">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('tipang',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-pigjiao"><div class="item-icon">🐷</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">醬燒豬腳</div><div class="item-desc">600g ± 10%</div></div><div class="item-price">290</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('pigjiao',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-pigjiao">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('pigjiao',1)">＋</button></div></div>
  <div class="item-card" id="card-sun"><div class="item-icon">🎋</div><div class="item-info"><div class="item-name">香滷嫩筍</div><div class="item-desc">600g ± 10%</div></div><div class="item-price">130</div><div class="qty-ctrl"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('sun',-1)">−</button><div class="qty-num" id="qn-sun">0</div><button class="qty-btn" onclick="cq('sun',1)">＋</button></div></div>
</div>
<div class="form-card">
  <div class="form-sec-title">📋 訂購人資料</div>
  <div class="field"><label class="fl" for="name">姓名 <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="text" id="name" placeholder="請輸入姓名"><div class="errmsg" id="err-name">請填寫姓名</div></div>
  <div class="field"><label class="fl" for="phone">電話 <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="tel" id="phone" placeholder="請輸入聯絡電話"><div class="errmsg" id="err-phone">請填寫電話</div></div>
</div>
<div class="form-card">
  <div class="form-sec-title">🏪 取貨方式</div>
  <div class="field">
    <div class="toggle-group three">
      <div class="toggle-option" id="opt-self"><input type="radio" name="pickup" id="pickup-self" value="自取"><label class="tl" for="pickup-self"><span class="tl-icon">🏠</span>自取</label></div>
      <div class="toggle-option" id="opt-delivery"><input type="radio" name="pickup" id="pickup-delivery" value="宅配"><label class="tl" for="pickup-delivery"><span class="tl-icon">🚛</span>低溫宅配</label></div>
      <div class="toggle-option" id="opt-711"><input type="radio" name="pickup" id="pickup-711" value="7-11店到店"><label class="tl" for="pickup-711"><span class="tl-icon">🏪</span>7-11店到店</label></div>
    </div>
    <div class="errmsg" id="err-pickup">請選擇取貨方式</div>
  </div>
  <div class="hidden-field" id="calendar-field">
    <div class="calendar-wrap">
      <div class="cal-header"><button class="cal-nav" onclick="calPrev()">‹</button><div class="cal-title" id="calTitle"></div><button class="cal-nav" onclick="calNext()">›</button></div>
      <div class="cal-grid" id="calGrid"></div>
      <div class="cal-legend"><span><span class="dot dot-avail"></span>可取貨日</span><span><span class="dot dot-sel"></span>已選日期</span></div>
      <div class="selected-date-display" id="selDateDisplay" style="display:none"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="errmsg" id="err-date">請選擇自取日期</div>
  </div>
  <div class="hidden-field" id="addr-field">
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px;"><label class="fl" for="address">配送地址 <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="text" id="address" placeholder="請填寫完整地址"><div class="errmsg" id="err-address">請填寫配送地址</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="hidden-field" id="store711-field">
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px;"><label class="fl" for="store711">7-11 門市名稱 <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="text" id="store711" placeholder="例：高雄三民門市"><div class="errmsg" id="err-store711">請填寫門市名稱</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="form-card">
  <div class="form-sec-title">💳 付款方式</div>
  <div class="field">
    <div class="toggle-group">
      <div class="toggle-option" id="opt-cash"><input type="radio" name="payment" id="pay-cash" value="現金"><label class="tl" for="pay-cash"><span class="tl-icon">💵</span>現金</label></div>
      <div class="toggle-option" id="opt-transfer"><input type="radio" name="payment" id="pay-transfer" value="匯款"><label class="tl" for="pay-transfer"><span class="tl-icon">🏦</span>匯款</label></div>
    </div>
    <div class="errmsg" id="err-payment">請選擇付款方式</div>
  </div>
  <div class="hidden-field" id="bank-field">
    <div class="bank-box"><div class="bk-label">匯款帳戶</div><div class="bk-val">合作金庫 006<br>帳號：0590765435341</div></div>
    <div class="field"><label class="fl" for="last5">匯款後五碼 <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="tel" id="last5" placeholder="請填寫匯款帳號後五碼" maxlength="5"><div class="errmsg" id="err-last5">請填寫匯款後五碼（5位數字）</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="cart-strip">
  <div class="cart-total">
    訂單總計<strong id="totalDisplay">0</strong>
    <div class="sub-note" id="cartSubNote"></div>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-checkout" id="btnCheckout" onclick="openConfirm()" disabled>確認訂單</button>
</div>
<div class="modal-bg" id="modalBg">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-title">📋 訂單確認</div>
    <div id="confirmContent"></div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-back-modal" onclick="closeConfirm()">← 修改</button>
      <button class="btn-confirm-send" id="btnSend" onclick="submitOrder()">確認送出</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="success-screen" id="successScreen">
  <div class="success-stamp"><span>🎉</span></div>
  <h2>訂單送出成功！</h2>
  <p>您的訂單編號</p>
  <div class="order-id-box" id="successId">—</div>
  <p>請截圖保留訂單編號<br>我們收到後會盡快為您準備<br><br>訂購專線：<a href="tel:0980388219" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:700;">0980-388-219</a></p>
  <button class="btn-again" onclick="resetAll()">繼續訂購</button>
</div>
<script>
const SCRIPT_URL="https://script.google.com/macros/s/YOUR_SCRIPT_ID/exec";
const MENU={
  A:{name:"A套餐",desc:"東坡肉＋香滷嫩筍",price:560},
  B:{name:"B套餐",desc:"醬燒蹄膀＋香滷嫩筍",price:580},
  C:{name:"C套餐",desc:"東坡肉＋醬燒豬腳＋香滷嫩筍",price:820},
  D:{name:"D套餐",desc:"醬燒蹄膀＋醬燒豬腳＋香滷嫩筍",price:840},
  E:{name:"E套餐",desc:"東坡肉＋醬燒蹄膀＋醬燒豬腳＋香滷嫩筍",price:1260},
  F:{name:"F套餐",desc:"東坡肉＋醬燒豬腳",price:710},
  G:{name:"G套餐",desc:"醬燒蹄膀＋醬燒豬腳",price:730},
  H:{name:"H套餐",desc:"東坡肉＋醬燒蹄膀＋醬燒豬腳",price:1160},
  dongpo:{name:"東坡肉",desc:"500g±10%",price:450},
  tipang:{name:"醬燒蹄膀",desc:"700g±10%",price:470},
  pigjiao:{name:"醬燒豬腳",desc:"600g±10%",price:290},
  sun:{name:"香滷嫩筍",desc:"600g±10%",price:130}
};
const qty={};Object.keys(MENU).forEach(k=>qty[k]=0);
let availableDates=new Set();
async function loadAvailableDates(){
  try{const r=await fetch(SCRIPT_URL+"?action=getAvailableDates&t="+Date.now());const d=await r.json();if(d.success)availableDates=new Set(d.dates);}catch(e){}
  renderCal();
}
let calYear=new Date().getFullYear(),calMonth=new Date().getMonth(),selectedDate="";
const DOW=["日","一","二","三","四","五","六"];
function renderCal(){
  document.getElementById("calTitle").textContent=calYear+"年"+(calMonth+1)+"月";
  const grid=document.getElementById("calGrid");
  let html=DOW.map(d=>'<div class="cal-dow">'+d+'</div>').join("");
  const first=new Date(calYear,calMonth,1).getDay();
  const days=new Date(calYear,calMonth+1,0).getDate();
  const today=new Date();today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  for(let i=0;i<first;i++)html+='<div class="cal-day empty"></div>';
  for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){
    const ds=calYear+"/"+String(calMonth+1).padStart(2,"0")+"/"+String(d).padStart(2,"0");
    const dt=new Date(calYear,calMonth,d);
    const isPast=dt<today,isAvail=availableDates.has(ds),isSel=selectedDate===ds,isToday=dt.getTime()===today.getTime();
    let cls="cal-day";if(isPast)cls+=" past";else if(isAvail)cls+=" available";if(isSel)cls+=" selected";if(isToday)cls+=" today-mark";
    const oc=(!isPast&&isAvail)?' onclick="selectDate(\''+ds+'\')"':'';
    html+='<div class="'+cls+'"'+oc+'>'+d+'</div>';
  }
  grid.innerHTML=html;
}
function selectDate(d){selectedDate=d;const el=document.getElementById("selDateDisplay");el.textContent="✅ 已選擇："+d;el.style.display="block";document.getElementById("err-date").classList.remove("show");renderCal();}
function calPrev(){if(calMonth===0){calMonth=11;calYear--;}else calMonth--;renderCal();}
function calNext(){if(calMonth===11){calMonth=0;calYear++;}else calMonth++;renderCal();}
function cq(k,d){qty[k]=Math.max(0,(qty[k]||0)+d);const el=document.getElementById("qn-"+k);el.textContent=qty[k];el.className="qty-num"+(qty[k]>0?" nz":"");document.getElementById("card-"+k).classList.toggle("active",qty[k]>0);updateTotal();}
function getSubtotal(){return Object.keys(MENU).reduce((s,k)=>s+MENU[k].price*qty[k],0);}
function calcShipping(sub,pickup){
  if(pickup==="自取")return{fee:0,label:"自取免運費",note:""};
  if(sub>=3000)return{fee:0,label:"滿$3,000免運",note:"單地點，限20kg"};
  if(pickup==="7-11店到店")return{fee:150,label:"7-11 店到店 $150",note:"單地點，限10kg，超過需寄第二件"};
  return{fee:200,label:"宅配通低溫宅配 $200",note:"單地點，限20kg，超過需寄第二件"};
}
function updateTotal(){
  const sub=getSubtotal();
  const pickup=(document.querySelector('input[name="pickup"]:checked')||{}).value||"";
  const s=calcShipping(sub,pickup);
  const grand=sub+s.fee;
  document.getElementById("totalDisplay").textContent=grand.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById("btnCheckout").disabled=sub===0;
  const note=document.getElementById("cartSubNote");
  if(sub===0){note.textContent="";}
  else if(pickup==="自取"){note.textContent="（自取免運費）";}
  else if(pickup==="宅配"||pickup==="7-11店到店"){
    note.textContent=s.fee===0?"（滿$3,000免運）":"（商品$"+sub.toLocaleString()+" ＋ 運費$"+s.fee+"）";
  } else {note.textContent="（請選取貨方式以計算運費）";}
}
document.querySelectorAll('input[name="pickup"]').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener("change",onPickupChange));
document.querySelectorAll('input[name="payment"]').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener("change",onPayChange));
function onPickupChange(){
  const v=(document.querySelector('input[name="pickup"]:checked')||{}).value;
  document.getElementById("calendar-field").classList.toggle("hidden-field",v!=="自取");
  document.getElementById("addr-field").classList.toggle("hidden-field",v!=="宅配");
  document.getElementById("store711-field").classList.toggle("hidden-field",v!=="7-11店到店");
  const cashOpt=document.getElementById("opt-cash");
  if(v==="自取"){cashOpt.classList.remove("disabled");}
  else{cashOpt.classList.add("disabled");document.getElementById("pay-transfer").checked=true;onPayChange();}
  if(v==="自取"){document.querySelectorAll('input[name="payment"]').forEach(r=>r.checked=false);document.getElementById("bank-field").classList.add("hidden-field");}
  updateTotal();
}
function onPayChange(){const isT=document.getElementById("pay-transfer").checked;document.getElementById("bank-field").classList.toggle("hidden-field",!isT);if(!isT)document.getElementById("last5").value="";}
function showErr(id,show){document.getElementById(id)?.classList.toggle("show",show);}
function markErr(id,show){document.getElementById(id)?.classList.toggle("ef",show);}
function validate(){
  let ok=true;
  const name=document.getElementById("name").value.trim();
  if(!name){showErr("err-name",true);markErr("name",true);ok=false;}else{showErr("err-name",false);markErr("name",false);}
  const phone=document.getElementById("phone").value.trim();
  if(!phone){showErr("err-phone",true);markErr("phone",true);ok=false;}else{showErr("err-phone",false);markErr("phone",false);}
  const pickup=(document.querySelector('input[name="pickup"]:checked')||{}).value;
  if(!pickup){showErr("err-pickup",true);ok=false;}else showErr("err-pickup",false);
  if(pickup==="自取"&&!selectedDate){showErr("err-date",true);ok=false;}else showErr("err-date",false);
  if(pickup==="宅配"){const addr=document.getElementById("address").value.trim();if(!addr){showErr("err-address",true);markErr("address",true);ok=false;}else{showErr("err-address",false);markErr("address",false);}}
  if(pickup==="7-11店到店"){const s=document.getElementById("store711").value.trim();if(!s){showErr("err-store711",true);markErr("store711",true);ok=false;}else{showErr("err-store711",false);markErr("store711",false);}}
  const payment=(document.querySelector('input[name="payment"]:checked')||{}).value;
  if(!payment){showErr("err-payment",true);ok=false;}else showErr("err-payment",false);
  if(payment==="匯款"){const l5=document.getElementById("last5").value.trim();if(!/^\d{5}$/.test(l5)){showErr("err-last5",true);markErr("last5",true);ok=false;}else{showErr("err-last5",false);markErr("last5",false);}}
  return ok;
}
function openConfirm(){
  if(!validate()){document.querySelector(".errmsg.show")?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth",block:"center"});return;}
  const pickup=(document.querySelector('input[name="pickup"]:checked')||{}).value;
  const payment=(document.querySelector('input[name="payment"]:checked')||{}).value;
  const last5=document.getElementById("last5").value.trim();
  const addr=document.getElementById("address").value.trim();
  const store711=document.getElementById("store711").value.trim();
  const name=document.getElementById("name").value.trim();
  const phone=document.getElementById("phone").value.trim();
  const sub=getSubtotal();const s=calcShipping(sub,pickup);const grand=sub+s.fee;
  const lines=Object.keys(MENU).filter(k=>qty[k]>0).map(k=>({name:MENU[k].name,qty:qty[k],sub:MENU[k].price*qty[k]}));
  const itemsHtml=lines.map(l=>'<div class="confirm-item-line"><span>'+l.name+' × '+l.qty+'</span><span>$'+l.sub.toLocaleString()+'</span></div>').join("");
  let pickupDisplay=pickup;
  if(pickup==="自取")pickupDisplay="自取（"+selectedDate+"）";
  if(pickup==="7-11店到店")pickupDisplay="7-11 店到店（"+store711+"）";
  let addrRow="";
  if(pickup==="宅配")addrRow='<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">配送地址</span><span class="cv">'+esc(addr)+'</span></div>';
  if(pickup==="7-11店到店")addrRow='<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">取貨門市</span><span class="cv">'+esc(store711)+'</span></div>';
  document.getElementById("confirmContent").innerHTML=
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">姓名</span><span class="cv">'+esc(name)+'</span></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">電話</span><span class="cv">'+esc(phone)+'</span></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">取貨方式</span><span class="cv">'+pickupDisplay+'</span></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">付款方式</span><span class="cv">'+payment+(last5?"（後五碼："+last5+"）":"")+'</span></div>'+
    addrRow+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">訂購品項</span><div class="cv"><div>'+itemsHtml+'</div></div></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">商品小計</span><span class="cv">$'+sub.toLocaleString()+'</span></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">'+s.label+'</span><span class="cv">'+( s.fee===0?"免運":"$"+s.fee)+'</span></div>'+
    '<div class="confirm-row"><span class="ck">訂單總計</span><span class="cv total">$'+grand.toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
  document.getElementById("modalBg").classList.add("open");
}
function closeConfirm(){document.getElementById("modalBg").classList.remove("open");}
async function submitOrder(){
  const btn=document.getElementById("btnSend");btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent="送出中…";
  const pickup=(document.querySelector('input[name="pickup"]:checked')||{}).value;
  const payment=(document.querySelector('input[name="payment"]:checked')||{}).value;
  const sub=getSubtotal();const s=calcShipping(sub,pickup);const grand=sub+s.fee;
  let payStatus,shipStatus;
  if(pickup==="自取"&&payment==="現金"){payStatus="現金未收";shipStatus="待自取";}
  else if(pickup==="自取"&&payment==="匯款"){payStatus="待確認";shipStatus="待自取";}
  else{payStatus="待確認";shipStatus="待出貨";}
  const itemDetail=Object.keys(MENU).filter(k=>qty[k]>0).map(k=>MENU[k].name+" x"+qty[k]+"，小計"+MENU[k].price*qty[k]).join("；");
  const pickupDisplay=pickup==="自取"?"自取（"+selectedDate+"）":pickup==="7-11店到店"?"7-11店到店（"+document.getElementById("store711").value.trim()+"）":pickup;
  const data={name:document.getElementById("name").value.trim(),phone:document.getElementById("phone").value.trim(),pickup:pickupDisplay,payment,last5:document.getElementById("last5").value.trim(),address:pickup==="宅配"?document.getElementById("address").value.trim():"",store711:pickup==="7-11店到店"?document.getElementById("store711").value.trim():"",pickupDate:pickup==="自取"?selectedDate:"",qty:Object.keys(MENU).filter(k=>qty[k]>0).reduce((s,k)=>s+qty[k],0),itemDetail,total:grand,shippingFee:s.fee,payStatus,shipStatus};
  try{
    const resp=await fetch(SCRIPT_URL,{method:"POST",body:JSON.stringify({action:"submitOrder",data})});
    const result=await resp.json();
    if(result.success){closeConfirm();document.getElementById("mainScreen").style.display="none";document.querySelector(".cart-strip").style.display="none";document.getElementById("successId").textContent=result.orderId;document.getElementById("successScreen").style.display="block";window.scrollTo(0,0);}
    else{alert("送出失敗："+result.message);btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent="確認送出";}
  }catch(e){alert("網路錯誤，請稍後再試");btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent="確認送出";}
}
function esc(s){return String(s||"").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;");}
function resetAll(){
  Object.keys(MENU).forEach(k=>{qty[k]=0;const el=document.getElementById("qn-"+k);if(el){el.textContent="0";el.className="qty-num";}const c=document.getElementById("card-"+k);if(c)c.classList.remove("active");});
  ["name","phone","address","last5","store711"].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value="";});
  selectedDate="";document.getElementById("selDateDisplay").style.display="none";
  document.querySelectorAll("input[type=radio]").forEach(r=>r.checked=false);
  ["bank-field","addr-field","store711-field","calendar-field"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).classList.add("hidden-field"));
  document.getElementById("opt-cash").classList.remove("disabled");
  
  updateTotal();document.getElementById("btnSend").disabled=false;document.getElementById("btnSend").textContent="確認送出";
  document.getElementById("mainScreen").style.display="block";document.querySelector(".cart-strip").style.display="flex";
  document.getElementById("successScreen").style.display="none";window.scrollTo(0,0);
}
renderCal();updateTotal();loadAvailableDates();
</script>
</body>
</html>
